title: rhus copallinum var. leucantha
intro: Rhus copallinum var. leucantha, also known as Smooth Sumac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America, belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its rich content of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Smooth Sumac include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions and digestive issues. Smooth Sumac can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
